message:
test(rch-common): Add 14 new tests to test_change.rs

- Added tests for TestCodeChange Debug and Clone traits
- Added tests for for_lib_rs function and error cases
- Added tests for Hello World and Hello from test project patterns
- Added tests for TestChangeGuard change_id and file_path methods
- Added tests for manual revert and apply/revert cycles
- Added tests for empty file handling and change ID format
- Increased test count from 6 to 20

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
